notes: Account & Billing (both NEW). manage-subscriptions: my.deepcharts.com dashboard > Subscriptions - view platform license + data products, renewal, changing data products means re-signing the market data contract, cancel data feed vs cancel platform, '[CONFIRM: refund policy link]' placeholder; NEVER state prices or specific offers. move-to-new-computer: save workspaces/templates to Cloud (tied to license) or copy Documents/deepchart folders; reinstall + license activation on the new PC ('[CONFIRM: whether old machine must be deactivated first]'); re-enter feed credentials (never migrated); redo Symbol Manage or load a Cloud workspace; optional Database Folder move.

articles.title: Move DeepCharts to a New Computer
